query: SELECT ticker, outcome, COUNT(*) as trades, ROUND(AVG(CAST(roiPct AS DECIMAL(10,2))),2) as avgRoi, ROUND(SUM(CAST(profitLoss AS DECIMAL(12,2))),0) as totalPnl FROM labTrades WHERE simulationId = 810001 GROUP BY ticker, outcome ORDER BY totalPnl DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT ticker, outcome, COUNT(*) as trades, ROUND(AVG(CAST(roiPct AS DECIMAL(10,2))),2) as avgRoi, ROUND(SUM(CAST(profitLoss AS DECIMAL(12,2))),0) as totalPnl FROM labTrades WHERE simulationId = 810001 GROUP BY ticker, outcome ORDER BY totalPnl DESC LIMIT 20;
